title: ESH Engineer (Chemical Plant) - KT
description:
• Basic Salary + AWS + VB
  • Location: Jurong Island (Shuttle Bus pick up from Jurong East & Lakeside)

Seeking a proactive and detail-oriented ESH professional to support the ESH Section Manager in driving workplace safety excellence.
In this role, the candidate will play a pivotal part in implementing safety programs, ensuring regulatory compliance, and fostering a culture of safety across operations.



Job Description:

➤Communication with Vendor and Supplier
Request quotations, verify product specifications meet operational needs, coordinate service/delivery schedules, liaise with suppliers to resolve issues, and gather feedback from process owners.

➤Data Collection for ESH-related activities
Collect and analyze ESH data from process owners, interpret findings, gather stakeholder feedback, and collaborate on improvement solutions.

➤Promotion of In-house Safety Culture and Awareness
Conduct workplace inspections, deliver safety training, participate in risk assessments (HAZOP/EAI/PPE), organize safety programs, communicate incident learnings, facilitate new staff inductions, perform PSSR inspections, assist in ESH meetings, and promote improvement suggestions.

➤Compliance to Legal and Other Requirements
Arrange third-party testing/training (hygiene monitoring, forklift certs, etc.), provide legal compliance guidance, assist in SHMS audits and legal register updates, communicate regulatory changes, and support documentation submissions.

➤Contractor Management
Review contractor submissions, conduct safety inductions, monitor on-site work compliance, enforce PTW and 5S standards, manage contractor activities, and coordinate laydown/resting areas with stakeholders.

➤Process Safety Improvement
Analyze process flows, identify pain points, propose tech-driven solutions, review SOPs/MOC designs with owners, and integrate LOTO/safe shutdown procedures.

➤Emergency Response
Support SIC/SMC/FSM in preparedness drills, coordinate with admin/security, liaise with authorities, verify emergency equipment, and assist in ERP revisions.



Requirements:
➤Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Chemistry, Environmental Science, or a related field.
➤Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in ESH, process safety, or a related field.

WSQ Certifications:
➤Specialist in WSH (Level C)
➤Manage Work at Height
➤Supervise Work in Confined Spaces
➤Assess Confined Spaces for Safe Entry & Work
➤Implement Incident Management Processes
➤Develop Risk Management Implementation Plans

Technical Skills:
➤Proficient in Microsoft Office (advanced formulas, functions, and data tools).
➤Working knowledge of ISO standards and management systems.
➤Strong grasp of Singapore legal ESH requirements.
➤Experience with MHI implementation and assessment.
➤Solid foundation in Process Safety principles.
➤Proactive, adaptable, and eager to learn.
➤Strong communicator with empathy to navigate complex issues.
➤Team player who thrives both independently and collaboratively.
➤Leadership mindset, promoting and exemplifying safe work practices.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Other applications will be updated to our database for future job opportunities.
